sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106976" key="u(pasqene/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπασθενέω</orth>, <sense id="n106976.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be a little unwell,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.120B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.120B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
